name: infinite-retry
description: Same tool called 5+ times consecutively with similar arguments

name: non-retryable-retry
description: Deterministic validation error followed by identical retry
detection_key: error_text matches validation_pattern AND identical_retry within 2 turns

name: tool-as-text
description: Tool invocation syntax in assistant text without corresponding toolCall blocks

name: subagent-replay
description: Duplicate assistant messages in subagent sessions

name: cost-spike
description: Single turn cost exceeds $0.50 or session cost unusually high

name: skill-miss
description: Tool call fails because required binary/skill dependency is missing

name: model-routing-waste
description: Expensive model used for low-complexity cron/heartbeat sessions
detection_key: sessionKey matches cron_pattern AND model in premium_tier

name: cron-accumulation
description: Growing inputTokens across sequential cron session starts

name: compaction-damage
description: Post-compaction tool call repetition — agent re-does already-completed work

name: workspace-overhead
description: System prompt + workspace files consume >15% of context window at session start

name: task-drift
description: Agent drifts to unrelated directories after compaction, or enters exploration spiral (10+ reads without edits)

name: unbounded-walk
description: Repeated unscoped recursive filesystem commands (find, grep -r) or exponentially growing tool output

name: tool-misuse
description: Same file read 3+ times without intervening edit, or identical search repeated 3+ times
